name: guardian-security-scan
description: Guardian scans npm and Python projects for known vulnerable, known exploited, malicious, and high-risk package findings.

interface.shortDescription: Scan project dependencies for known supply-chain risk.
interface.longDescription: Guardian Security Scan gives Codex a practical dependency-risk workflow for modern projects. It inventories npm and Python packages, checks exact versions against multiple advisory and exploit-intelligence sources, separates direct runtime risk from transitive, tooling-only, isolated-environment, and vendored-metadata noise, and produces operator-friendly summaries that explain what matters, what changed since the last scan, and what action is justified. Use it before releases, after dependency changes, when reviewing a reported advisory, or when you want Codex to reduce supply-chain risk without creating unnecessary dependency churn.
defaultPrompt: Check this repo for package risk.
Scout these public GitHub repos with temporary Guardian state.
